requirement:
用例名：test_ms_deepseekr1_671b_vllm_infer_det_ceval_v1_tp32_bf16_910b3_32p_0003

模型名称，规格：deepseek r1 671B

权重路径：self.ds_r1_model_path = "/home/workspace/large_model_ckpt_new/deepseek_r1_bf16_safetensor/"

模型所在代码仓：不涉及

服务拉起前环境变量（可选）：export MS_ENABLE_LCCL=off;export ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7;export HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE=AIV;export HCCL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT=7200;export PROTOCOL_BUFFERS_PYTHON_IMPLEMENTATION=python;export VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1;

服务拉起命令：vllm-mindspore serve {self.ds_r1_model_path} --trust-remote-code --max-num-seqs=192 --max-model-len=16384 --max-num-batched-tokens=16384 --block-size=128 --gpu-memory-utilization=0.93 --tensor-parallel-size 32 --no-enable-chunked-prefill --no-enable-prefix-caching --distributed-executor-backend ray

执行测试类型：aisbench ceval测试，使用aisbench_test方法，测试规格：max_out_en:4096，batch_size:256，数据集：cevaLchat_prompt
要求：执行两次ceval测试，执行日志需分别保存

校验指标及基线来源：校验两次ceval测试得分，两次等分相差不能超过1
